products.name: 0001 - Bulbasaur
products.pokemon_description: BULBASAUR can be seen napping in bright sunlight. There is a seed on its back. By soaking up the sun’s rays, the seed grows progressively larger.

products.name: 0001 - Bulbasaur - Christmas
products.pokemon_description: BULBASAUR can be seen napping in bright sunlight. There is a seed on its back. By soaking up the sun’s rays, the seed grows progressively larger.

products.name: 0001 - Bulbasaur - Love
products.pokemon_description: BULBASAUR can be seen napping in bright sunlight. There is a seed on its back. By soaking up the sun’s rays, the seed grows progressively larger.

products.name: 0002 - Ivysaur
products.pokemon_description: There is a bud on this character’s back. To support its weight, IVYSAUR’s legs and trunk grow thick and strong. If it starts spending more time lying in the sunlight, it’s a sign that the bud will bloom into a large flower soon.

products.name: 0003 - Venusaur
products.pokemon_description: There is a large flower on VENUSAUR’s back. The flower is said to take on vivid colors if it gets plenty of nutrition and sunlight. The flower’s aroma soothes the emotions of people.

products.name: 0004 - Charmander
products.pokemon_description: The flame that burns at the tip of its tail is an indication of its emotions. The flame wavers when CHARMANDER is enjoying itself. If the character becomes enraged, the flame burns fiercely.

products.name: 0005 - Charmeleon
products.pokemon_description: CHARMELEON mercilessly destroys its foes using its sharp claws. If it encounters a strong foe, it turns aggressive. In this excited state, the flame at the tip of its tail flares with a bluish white color.

products.name: 0006 - Charizard
products.pokemon_description: CHARIZARD flies around the sky in search of powerful opponents. It breathes fire of such great heat that it melts anything. However, it never turns its fiery breath on any opponent weaker than itself.

products.name: 0006 - Mega Charizard X
products.pokemon_description: When expressing its anger, the flame at the tip of its tail flares up in a whitish-blue color.

products.name: 0007 - Squirtle
products.pokemon_description: SQUIRTLE’s shell is not merely used for protection. The shell’s rounded shape and the grooves on its surface help minimize resistance in water, enabling this character to swim at high speeds.

products.name: 0008 - Wartortle
products.pokemon_description: Its tail is large and covered with a rich, thick fur. The tail becomes increasingly deeper in color as WARTORTLE ages. The scratches on its shell are evidence of this character’s toughness as a battler.

products.name: 0009 - Blastoise
products.pokemon_description: BLASTOISE has water spouts that protrude from its shell. The water spouts are very accurate. They can shoot bullets of water with enough accuracy to strike empty cans from a distance of over 160 feet.

products.name: 0009 - Mega Blastoise
products.pokemon_description: The cannon-like arms enable it to fire water powerful enough to destroy a city wall.

products.name: 0010 - Caterpie
products.pokemon_description: CATERPIE has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this character releases a terrifically strong odor.

products.name: 0011 - Metapod
products.pokemon_description: The shell covering this character’s body is as hard as an iron slab. METAPOD does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.

products.name: 0012 - Butterfree
products.pokemon_description: BUTTERFREE has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.

products.name: 0013 - Weedle
products.pokemon_description: WEEDLE has an extremely acute sense of smell. It is capable of distinguishing its favorite kinds of leaves from those it dislikes just by sniffing with its big red proboscis (nose).

products.name: 0014 - Kakuna
products.pokemon_description: KAKUNA remains virtually immobile as it clings to a tree. However, on the inside, it is extremely busy as it prepares for its coming evolution. This is evident from how hot the shell becomes to the touch.

products.name: 0015 - Beedrill
products.pokemon_description: BEEDRILL is extremely territorial. No one should ever approach its nest - this is for their own safety. If angered, they will attack in a furious swarm.

products.name: 0016 - Pidgey
products.pokemon_description: PIDGEY has an extremely sharp sense of direction. It is capable of unerringly returning home to its nest, however far it may be removed from its familiar surroundings.

products.name: 0017 - Pidgeotto
products.pokemon_description: PIDGEOTTO claims a large area as its own territory. This character flies around, patrolling its living space. If its territory is violated, it shows no mercy in thoroughly punishing the foe with its sharp claws.

products.name: 0018 - Pidgeot
products.pokemon_description: This character has a dazzling plumage of beautifully glossy feathers. Many TRAINERS are captivated by the striking beauty of the feathers on its head, compelling them to choose PIDGEOT as their character.

products.name: 0019 - Rattata
products.pokemon_description: RATTATA is cautious in the extreme. Even while it is asleep, it constantly listens by moving its ears around. It is not picky about where it lives - it will make its nest anywhere.

products.name: 0020 - Raticate
products.pokemon_description: Its disposition is far more violent than its looks would suggest. Don’t let your hand get too close to its face, as it could bite your hand clean off.

products.name: 0021 - Spearow
products.pokemon_description: SPEAROW has a very loud cry that can be heard over half a mile away. If its high, keening cry is heard echoing all around, it is a sign that they are warning each other of danger.

products.name: 0022 - Fearow
products.pokemon_description: FEAROW is recognized by its long neck and elongated beak. They are conveniently shaped for catching prey in soil or water. It deftly moves its long and skinny beak to pluck prey.

products.name: 0023 - Ekans
products.pokemon_description: EKANS curls itself up in a spiral while it rests. Assuming this position allows it to quickly respond to a threat from any direction with a glare from its upraised head.

products.name: 0024 - Arbok
products.pokemon_description: This character is terrifically strong in order to constrict things with its body. It can even flatten steel oil drums. Once ARBOK wraps its body around its foe, escaping its crunching embrace is impossible.

products.name: 0025 - Pikachu
products.pokemon_description: This character has electricity-storing pouches on its cheeks. These appear to become electrically charged during the night while PIKACHU sleeps. It occasionally discharges electricity when it is dozy after waking up.

products.name: 0025 - Pikachu - Female
products.pokemon_description: This character has electricity-storing pouches on its cheeks. These appear to become electrically charged during the night while PIKACHU sleeps. It occasionally discharges electricity when it is dozy after waking up.

products.name: 0026 - Mega Raichu X
products.pokemon_description: This character exudes a weak electrical charge from all over its body that makes it take on a slight glow in darkness. RAICHU searches for electricity by planting its tail in the ground.

products.name: 0026 - Mega Raichu Y
products.pokemon_description: This character exudes a weak electrical charge from all over its body that makes it take on a slight glow in darkness. RAICHU searches for electricity by planting its tail in the ground.

products.name: 0026 - Raichu
products.pokemon_description: This character exudes a weak electrical charge from all over its body that makes it take on a slight glow in darkness. RAICHU searches for electricity by planting its tail in the ground.

products.name: 0027 - Sandshrew
products.pokemon_description: SANDSHREW has a very dry hide that is extremely tough. The character can roll into a ball that repels any attack. At night, it burrows into the desert sand to sleep.

products.name: 0028 - Sandslash
products.pokemon_description: SANDSLASH can roll up its body as if it were a ball covered with large spikes. In battle, this character will try to make the foe flinch by jabbing it with its spines. It then leaps at the stunned foe to tear wildly with its sharp claws.

products.name: 0029 - Nidoran♀
products.pokemon_description: Nidoran♀ has barbs that secrete a powerful poison. They are thought to have developed as protection for this small-bodied character. When enraged, it releases a horrible toxin from its horn.

products.name: 0030 - Nidorina
products.pokemon_description: When NIDORINA are with their friends or family, they keep their barbs tucked away to prevent hurting each other. This character appears to become nervous if separated from the others.

products.name: 0031 - Nidoqueen
products.pokemon_description: NIDOQUEEN’s body is encased in extremely hard scales. It is adept at sending foes flying with harsh tackles. This character is at its strongest when it is defending its young.

products.name: 0032 - Nidoran♂
products.pokemon_description: The male NIDORAN has developed muscles for moving its ears. Thanks to them, the ears can be freely moved in any direction. Even the slightest sound does not escape this character’s notice.

products.name: 0033 - Nidorino
products.pokemon_description: NIDORINO has a horn that is harder than a diamond. If it senses a hostile presence, all the barbs on its back bristle up at once, and it challenges the foe with all its might.

products.name: 0034 - Nidoking
products.pokemon_description: NIDOKING’s thick tail packs enormously destructive power. With one swing, it can topple a metal transmission tower. Once this character goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

products.name: 0035 - Clefairy
products.pokemon_description: On every night of a full moon, groups of this character come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired CLEFAIRY return to their quiet mountain retreats and go to sleep nestled up against each other.

products.name: 0036 - Clefable
products.pokemon_description: CLEFABLE moves by skipping lightly as if it were flying using its wings. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. It is known to take strolls on lakes on quiet, moonlit nights.

products.name: 0037 - Vulpix
products.pokemon_description: Inside VULPIX’s body burns a flame that never goes out. During the daytime, when the temperatures rise, this character releases flames from its mouth to prevent its body from growing too hot.

products.name: 0038 - Ninetales
products.pokemon_description: Legend has it that NINETALES came into being when nine wizards possessing sacred powers merged into one. This character is highly intelligent - it can understand human speech.

products.name: 0039 - Jigglypuff
products.pokemon_description: When this character sings, it never pauses to breathe. If it is in a battle against an opponent that does not easily fall asleep, JIGGLYPUFF cannot breathe, endangering its life.

products.name: 0040 - Wiggletuff
products.pokemon_description: WIGGLYTUFF has large, saucerlike eyes. The surfaces of its eyes are always covered with a thin layer of tears. If any dust gets in this character’s eyes, it is quickly washed away.

products.name: 0041 - Zubat
products.pokemon_description: ZUBAT avoids sunlight because exposure causes it to become unhealthy. During the daytime, it stays in caves or under the eaves of old houses, sleeping while hanging upside down.

products.name: 0042 - Golbat
products.pokemon_description: GOLBAT loves to drink the blood of living things. It is particularly active in the pitch black of night. This character flits around in the night skies, seeking fresh blood.

products.name: 0043 - Oddish
products.pokemon_description: ODDISH searches for fertile, nutrient- rich soil, then plants itself. During the daytime, while it is planted, this character’s feet are thought to change shape and become similar to the roots of trees.

products.name: 0044 - Gloom
products.pokemon_description: GLOOM releases a foul fragrance from the pistil of its flower. When faced with danger, the stench worsens. If this character is feeling calm and secure, it does not release its usual stinky aroma.

products.name: 0045 - Vileplume
products.pokemon_description: VILEPLUME has the world’s largest petals. They are used to attract prey that are then doused with toxic spores. Once the prey are immobilized, this character catches and devours them.

products.name: 0046 - Paras
products.pokemon_description: PARAS has parasitic mushrooms growing on its back called tochukaso. They grow large by drawing nutrients from this BUG character host. They are highly valued as a medicine for extending life.

products.name: 0047 - Parasect
products.pokemon_description: PARASECT is known to infest large trees en masse and drain nutrients from the lower trunk and roots. When an infested tree dies, they move onto another tree all at once.

products.name: 0048 - Venonat
products.pokemon_description: VENONAT is said to have evolved with a coat of thin, stiff hair that covers its entire body for protection. It possesses large eyes that never fail to spot even miniscule prey.

products.name: 0049 - Venomoth
products.pokemon_description: VENOMOTH is nocturnal - it is a character that only becomes active at night. Its favorite prey are small insects that gather around streetlights, attracted by the light in the darkness.

products.name: 0050 - Diglett
products.pokemon_description: DIGLETT are raised in most farms. The reason is simple - wherever this character burrows, the soil is left perfectly tilled for planting crops. This soil is made ideal for growing delicious vegetables.

products.name: 0051 - Dugtrio
products.pokemon_description: DUGTRIO are actually triplets that emerged from one body. As a result, each triplet thinks exactly like the other two triplets. They work cooperatively to burrow endlessly.

products.name: 0052 - Meowth
products.pokemon_description: MEOWTH withdraws its sharp claws into its paws to slinkily sneak about without making any incriminating footsteps. For some reason, this character loves shiny coins that glitter with light.

products.name: 0053 - Persian
products.pokemon_description: PERSIAN has six bold whiskers that give it a look of toughness. The whiskers sense air movements to determine what is in the character’s surrounding vicinity. It becomes docile if grabbed by the whiskers.

products.name: 0054 - Psyduck
products.pokemon_description: If it uses its mysterious power, PSYDUCK can’t remember having done so. It apparently can’t form a memory of such an event because it goes into an altered state that is much like deep sleep.

products.name: 0055 - Golduck
products.pokemon_description: The webbed flippers on its forelegs and hind legs and the streamlined body of GOLDUCK give it frightening speed. This character is definitely much faster than even the most athletic swimmer.

products.name: 0056 - Mankey
products.pokemon_description: When MANKEY starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath.

products.name: 0057 - Primeape
products.pokemon_description: When PRIMEAPE becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time.

products.name: 0058 - Growlithe
products.pokemon_description: GROWLITHE has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this character won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things.

products.name: 0059 - Arcanine
products.pokemon_description: ARCANINE is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this character’s body is its source of power.

products.name: 0060 - Poliwag
products.pokemon_description: POLIWAG has a very thin skin. It is possible to see the character’s spiral innards right through the skin. Despite its thinness, however, the skin is also very flexible. Even sharp fangs bounce right off it.

products.name: 0061 - Poliwhirl
products.pokemon_description: The surface of Poliwhirl’s body is always wet and slick with a slimy fluid. Because of this slippery covering, it can easily slip and slide out of the clutches of any enemy in battle.

products.name: 0062 - Poliwrath
products.pokemon_description: POLIWRATH’s highly developed, brawny muscles never grow fatigued, however much it exercises. It is so tirelessly strong, this character can swim back and forth across the Pacific Ocean without effort.

products.name: 0063 - Abra
products.pokemon_description: ABRA needs to sleep for eighteen hours a day. If it doesn’t, this character loses its ability to use telekinetic powers. If it is attacked, ABRA escapes using TELEPORT while it is still sleeping.

products.name: 0064 - Kadabra
products.pokemon_description: KADABRA holds a silver spoon in its hand. The spoon is used to amplify the alpha waves in its brain. Without the spoon, the character is said to be limited to half the usual amount of its telekinetic powers.

products.name: 0065 - Alakazam
products.pokemon_description: ALAKAZAM’s brain continually grows, infinitely multiplying brain cells. This amazing brain gives this character an astoundingly high IQ of 5,000. It has a thorough memory of everything that has occurred in the world.

products.name: 0066 - Machop
products.pokemon_description: Though as small as a child, it has strength enough to easily throw a well-built adult. Striving to become ever stronger, Machop trains by carrying a Graveler on its shoulders.

products.name: 0067 - Machoke
products.pokemon_description: MACHOKE undertakes bodybuilding every day even as it helps people with tough, physically demanding labor. On its days off, this character heads to the fields and mountains to exercise and train.

products.name: 0068 - Machamp
products.pokemon_description: MACHAMP is known as the character that has mastered every kind of martial arts. If it grabs hold of the foe with its four arms, the battle is all but over. The hapless foe is thrown far over the horizon.

products.name: 0069 - Bellsprout
products.pokemon_description: BELLSPROUT’s thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, this character spits a corrosive fluid that melts even iron.

products.name: 0070 - Weepinbell
products.pokemon_description: WEEPINBELL has a large hook on its rear end. At night, the character hooks on to a tree branch and goes to sleep. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.

products.name: 0071 - Victreebel
products.pokemon_description: VICTREEBEL has a long vine that extends from its head. This vine is waved and flicked about as if it were an animal to attract prey. When an unsuspecting prey draws near, this character swallows it whole.

products.name: 0081 - Magnemite
products.pokemon_description: MAGNEMITE floats in the air by emitting electromagnetic waves from the units at its sides. These waves block gravity. This character becomes incapable of flight if its internal electrical supply is depleted.

products.name: 0082 - Magneton
products.pokemon_description: MAGNETON emits a powerful magnetic force that is fatal to electronics and precision instruments. Because of this, it is said that some towns warn people to keep this character inside a POKé BALL.

products.name: 0090 - Shellder
products.pokemon_description: At night, this character uses its broad tongue to burrow a hole in the seafloor sand and then sleep in it. While it is sleeping, SHELLDER closes its shell, but leaves its tongue hanging out.

products.name: 0091 - Cloyster
products.pokemon_description: CLOYSTER is capable of swimming in the sea. It does so by swallowing water, then jetting it out toward the rear. This character shoots spikes from its shell using the same system.

products.name: 0092 - Gastly
products.pokemon_description: GASTLY is largely composed of gaseous matter. When exposed to a strong wind, the gaseous body quickly dwindles away. Groups of this character cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.

products.name: 0093 - Haunter
products.pokemon_description: HAUNTER is a dangerous character. If one beckons you while floating in darkness, you must never approach it. This character will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.

products.name: 0094 - Gengar
products.pokemon_description: Sometimes, on a dark night, your shadow thrown by a streetlight will suddenly and startlingly overtake you. It is actually a GENGAR running past you, pretending to be your shadow.

products.name: 0094 - Mega Gengar
products.pokemon_description: It tries to take the lives of anyone and everyone. It will even try to curse the Trainer who is its master!

products.name: 0095 - Onix
products.pokemon_description: ONIX has a magnet in its brain. It acts as a compass so that this character does not lose direction while it is tunneling. As it grows older, its body becomes increasingly rounder and smoother.

products.name: 0098 - Krabby
products.pokemon_description: KRABBY live on beaches, burrowed inside holes dug into the sand. On sandy beaches with little in the way of food, these characters can be seen squabbling with each other over territory.

products.name: 0099 - Kingler
products.pokemon_description: KINGLER has an enormous, oversized claw. It waves this huge claw in the air to communicate with others. However, because the claw is so heavy, the character quickly tires.

products.name: 0100 - Voltorb
products.pokemon_description: An enigmatic character that happens to bear a resemblance to a Poké Ball. When excited, it discharges the electric current it has stored in its belly, then lets out a great, uproarious laugh.

products.name: 0101 - Electrode
products.pokemon_description: One of ELECTRODE’s characteristics is its attraction to electricity. It is a problematical character that congregates mostly at electrical power plants to feed on electricity that has just been generated.

products.name: 0102 - Exeggcute
products.pokemon_description: This character consists of six eggs that form a closely knit cluster. The six eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear on the eggs, EXEGGCUTE is close to evolution.

products.name: 0103 - Exeggutor
products.pokemon_description: EXEGGUTOR originally came from the tropics. Its heads steadily grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall off, they group together to form EXEGGCUTE.

products.name: 0104 - Cubone
products.pokemon_description: CUBONE pines for the mother it will never see again. Seeing a likeness of its mother in the full moon, it cries. The stains on the skull the character wears are made by the tears it sheds.

products.name: 0105 - Marowak
products.pokemon_description: MAROWAK is the evolved form of a CUBONE that has overcome its sadness at the loss of its mother and grown tough. This character’s tempered and hardened spirit is not easily broken.

products.name: 0109 - Koffing
products.pokemon_description: KOFFING embodies toxic substances. It mixes the toxins with raw garbage to set off a chemical reaction that results in a terribly powerful poison gas. The higher the temperature, the more gas is concocted by this character.

products.name: 0110 - Weezing
products.pokemon_description: WEEZING loves the gases given off by rotted kitchen garbage. This character will find a dirty, unkempt house and make it its home. At night, when the people in the house are asleep, it will go through the trash.

products.name: 0113 - Chansey
products.pokemon_description: CHANSEY lays nutritionally excellent eggs on an everyday basis. The eggs are so delicious, they are easily and eagerly devoured by even those people who have lost their appetite.

products.name: 0115 - Kangaskhan
products.pokemon_description: If you come across a young KANGASKHAN playing by itself, you must never disturb it or attempt to catch it. The baby character’s parent is sure to be in the area, and it will become violently enraged at you.

products.name: 0120 - Staryu
products.pokemon_description: STARYU apparently communicates with the stars in the night sky by flashing the red core at the center of its body. If parts of its body are torn, this character simply regenerates the missing pieces and limbs.

products.name: 0121 - Starmie
products.pokemon_description: STARMIE swims through water by spinning its star-shaped body as if it were a propeller on a ship. The core at the center of this character’s body glows in seven colors.

products.name: 0123 - Scyther
products.pokemon_description: SCYTHER is blindingly fast. Its blazing speed enhances the effectiveness of the twin scythes on its forearms. This character’s scythes are so effective, they can slice through thick logs in one wicked stroke.

products.name: 0125 - Electabuzz
products.pokemon_description: When a storm arrives, gangs of this character compete with each other to scale heights that are likely to be stricken by lightning bolts. Some towns use ELECTABUZZ in place of lightning rods.

products.name: 0127 - Pinsir
products.pokemon_description: Pinsir has a pair of massive horns. Protruding from the surface of these horns are thorns. These thorns are driven deeply into the foe’s body when the pincer closes, making it tough for the foe to escape.

products.name: 0128 - Tauros
products.pokemon_description: This character is not satisfied unless it is rampaging at all times. If there is no opponent for TAUROS to battle, it will charge at thick trees and knock them down to calm itself.

products.name: 0129 - Magikarp
products.pokemon_description: MAGIKARP is virtually useless in battle as it can only splash around. As a result, it is considered to be weak. However, it is actually a very hardy character that can survive in any body of water no matter how polluted it is.

products.name: 0130 - Gyarados
products.pokemon_description: Once GYARADOS goes on a rampage, its ferociously violent blood doesn’t calm until it has burned everything down. There are records of this character’s rampages lasting a whole month.

products.name: 0131 - Lapras
products.pokemon_description: People have driven LAPRAS almost to the point of extinction. In the evenings, this character is said to sing plaintively as it seeks what few others of its kind still remain.

products.name: 0132 - Ditto
products.pokemon_description: DITTO rearranges its cell structure to transform itself into other shapes. However, if it tries to transform itself into something by relying on its memory, this character manages to get details wrong.

products.name: 0133 - Eevee
products.pokemon_description: EEVEE has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates due to the environment in which it lives. Radiation from various STONES causes this character to evolve.

products.name: 0134 - Vaporeon
products.pokemon_description: Tests show that its cells closely resemble water molecules, which perhaps explains its ability to conceal its form while submerged. I believe the origins of mermaid folklore lie with this character.

products.name: 0135 - Jolteon
products.pokemon_description: JOLTEON’s cells generate a low level of electricity. This power is amplified by the static electricity of its fur, enabling the character to drop thunderbolts. The bristling fur is made of electrically charged needles.

products.name: 0136 - Flareon
products.pokemon_description: Flareon’s fluffy fur has a functional purpose—it releases heat into the air so that its body does not get excessively hot. This character’s body temperature can rise to a maximum of 1,650 degrees Fahrenheit.

products.name: 0143 - Snorlax
products.pokemon_description: SNORLAX’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile character that there are children who use its expansive belly as a place to play.

products.name: 0144 - Articuno
products.pokemon_description: ARTICUNO is a legendary bird character that can control ice. The flapping of its wings chills the air. As a result, it is said that when this character flies, snow will fall.

products.name: 0145 - Zapdos
products.pokemon_description: ZAPDOS is a legendary bird character that has the ability to control electricity. It usually lives in thunderclouds. The character gains power if it is stricken by lightning bolts.

products.name: 0146 - Moltres
products.pokemon_description: MOLTRES is a legendary bird character that has the ability to control fire. If this character is injured, it is said to dip its body in the molten magma of a volcano to burn and heal itself.

products.name: 0147 - Dratini
products.pokemon_description: A DRATINI continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.

products.name: 0148 - Dragonair
products.pokemon_description: DRAGONAIR stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter weather conditions in its vicinity by discharging energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.

products.name: 0149 - Dragonite
products.pokemon_description: DRAGONITE is capable of circling the globe in just sixteen hours. It is a kindhearted character that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.

products.name: 0150 - Mewtwo
products.pokemon_description: MEWTWO is a character that was created by genetic manipulation. However, even though the scientific power of humans created this character’s body, they failed to endow MEWTWO with a compassionate heart.

products.name: 0151 - Mew
products.pokemon_description: MEW is said to possess the genetic composition of all character. It is capable of making itself invisible at will, so it entirely avoids notice even if it approaches people.

products.name: 0152 - Chikorita
products.pokemon_description: In battle, CHIKORITA waves its leaf around to keep the foe at bay. However, a sweet fragrance also wafts from the leaf, becalming the battling character and creating a cozy, friendly atmosphere all around.

products.name: 0155 - Cyndaquil
products.pokemon_description: CYNDAQUIL protects itself by flaring up the flames on its back. The flames are vigorous if the character is angry. However, if it is tired, the flames splutter fitfully with incomplete combustion.

products.name: 0158 - Totodile
products.pokemon_description: Despite the smallness of its body, TOTODILE’s jaws are very powerful. While the character may think it is just playfully nipping, its bite has enough power to cause serious injury.

products.name: 0162 - Furret
products.pokemon_description: FURRET has a very slim build. When under attack, it can slickly squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, this character is very nimble and fleet.

products.name: 0172 - Pichu
products.pokemon_description: When PICHU plays with others, it may short out electricity with another PICHU, creating a shower of sparks. In that event, this character will begin crying, startled by the flash of sparks.

products.name: 0175 - Togepi
products.pokemon_description: As its energy, TOGEPI uses the positive emotions of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and character. This character stores up feelings of happiness inside its shell, then shares them with others.

products.name: 0194 - Wooper
products.pokemon_description: WOOPER usually lives in water. However, it occasionally comes out onto land in search of food. On land, it coats its body with a gooey, toxic film.

products.name: 0196 - Espeon
products.pokemon_description: Wields an arcane power with which it can predict the weather and even people's thoughts. When bathed in sunshine, the scarlet orb on its brow glows and builds energy.

products.name: 0197 - Umbreon
products.pokemon_description: UMBREON evolved as a result of exposure to the moon’s waves. It hides silently in darkness and waits for its foes to make a move. The rings on its body glow when it leaps to attack.

products.name: 0243 - Raikou
products.pokemon_description: RAIKOU embodies the speed of lightning. The roars of this character send shock waves shuddering through the air and shake the ground as if lightning bolts had come crashing down.

products.name: 0244 - Entei
products.pokemon_description: ENTEI embodies the passion of magma. This character is thought to have been born in the eruption of a volcano. It sends up massive bursts of fire that utterly consume all that they touch.

products.name: 0245 - Suicune
products.pokemon_description: SUICUNE embodies the compassion of a pure spring of water. It runs across the land with gracefulness. This character has the power to purify dirty water.

products.name: 0248 - Tyranitar
products.pokemon_description: TYRANITAR is so overwhelmingly powerful, it can bring down a whole mountain to make its nest. This character wanders about in mountains seeking new opponents to fight.

products.name: 0249 - Lugia
products.pokemon_description: LUGIA’s wings pack devastating power - a light fluttering of its wings can blow apart regular houses. As a result, this character chooses to live out of sight deep under the sea.

products.name: 0250 - Ho Oh
products.pokemon_description: HO-OH’s feathers glow in seven colors depending on the angle at which they are struck by light. These feathers are said to bring happiness to the bearers. This character is said to live at the foot of a rainbow.

products.name: 0251 - Celebi
products.pokemon_description: This character came from the future by crossing over time. It is thought that so long as CELEBI appears, a bright and shining future awaits us.

products.name: 0257 - Blaziken
products.pokemon_description: In battle, BLAZIKEN blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously. The stronger the foe, the more intensely this character’s wrists burn.

products.name: 0282 - Gardevoir
products.pokemon_description: It will dedicate itself to defending a master it has come to adore. Its pure white dress, reminiscent of those worn by ladies of nobility, is the dress of one who is willing to risk their life.

products.name: 0359 - Absol
products.pokemon_description: ABSOL has the ability to foretell the coming of natural disasters. It lives in a harsh, rugged mountain environment. This character very rarely ventures down from the mountains.

products.name: 0373 - Salamence
products.pokemon_description: SALAMENCE came about as a result of a strong, long-held dream of growing wings. It is said that this powerful desire triggered a sudden mutation in this character’s cells, causing it to sprout its magnificent wings.

products.name: 0376 - Metagross
products.pokemon_description: METAGROSS is the result of two METANG achieving fusion. When hunting, this character pins the prey to the ground under its massive body. It then eats the helpless victim using the large mouth on its stomach.

products.name: 0380 - Latias
products.pokemon_description: LATIAS is highly intelligent and capable of understanding human speech. It is covered with a glass-like down. The character enfolds its body with its down and refracts light to alter its appearance.

products.name: 0381 - Latios
products.pokemon_description: LATIOS will  open its heart to a TRAINER with a compassionate spirit. This character can fly faster than a jet plane by folding its forelegs to minimize air resistance.

products.name: 0382 - Kyogre
products.pokemon_description: KYOGRE is named in mythology as the character that expanded the sea by covering the land with torrential rains and towering tidal waves. It took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with GROUDON.

products.name: 0383 - Groudon
products.pokemon_description: GROUDON has long been described in mythology as the character that raised lands and expanded continents. This character took to sleep after a cataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.

products.name: 0384 - Rayquaza
products.pokemon_description: RAYQUAZA is said to have lived for hundreds of millions of years in the earth’s ozone layer, above the clouds. Its existence had been completely unknown because it lived so high in the sky.

products.name: 0385 - Jirachi
products.pokemon_description: A legend states that JIRACHI will make true any wish that is written on notes attached to its head when it awakens. If this character senses danger, it will fight without awakening.

products.name: 0393 - Piplup
products.pokemon_description: Prefers cold climes and appears along coasts. It's an adorable little thing—as cute as any child—but it's also prideful, unwilling to accept handouts from people.

products.name: 0445 - Garchomp
products.pokemon_description: Soars across the heavens at blinding speed—a magnificent sight! It has a feral disposition. Utmost caution is required if one meets a Garchomp out in the wilds.

products.name: 0448 - Lucario
products.pokemon_description: A most gallant-looking creature. It emits energy waves and controls them with precision, using them to sense even faraway beings. I have given the name ”aura” to this power.

products.name: 0448 - Mega Lucario
products.pokemon_description: It readies itself to face its enemies by focusing its mental energies. Its fighting style can be summed up in a single word: heartless.

products.name: 0470 - Leafeon
products.pokemon_description: Cells similar to those of plants have been found in its fur. Its hard tail can fell a large tree with one stroke, and the tail's sharpness exceeds even that of a sword crafted by a master.

products.name: 0471 - Glaceon
products.pokemon_description: Glaceon is able to lower its body temperature very quickly. It freezes the atmosphere, creating diamond dust that glitters like gems while it flutters and dances around.

products.name: 0483 - Dialga
products.pokemon_description: This character is revered as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Dialga was what caused the vast river of time to begin flowing in our world.

products.name: 0484 - Palkia
products.pokemon_description: This character is feared as a deity in Hisuian legend. The birth of Palkia was what caused the walls of our world to disappear, creating a sky that spans for infinity.

products.name: 0487 - Giratina
products.pokemon_description: There is one Hisuian verse that tells of a powerful light creating a deep shadow. I imagine that this deep shadow is Giratina.

products.name: 0491 - Darkrai
products.pokemon_description: On a moonless night, a strange incident occurred in which every one of a village's inhabitants suffered nightmares. The villagers attested that Darkrai appeared before them in these nightmares.

products.name: 0493 - Arceus
products.pokemon_description: It is the heavenly fount from which pours the light that shines across Hisui. Its luminance guides and protects all character. Hisuian mythology states that Arceus is the creator of all things.

products.name: 0568 - Trubbish
products.pokemon_description: Its favorite places are unsanitary ones. If you leave trash lying around, you could even find one of these characters living in your room.

products.name: 0570 - Zorua
products.pokemon_description: A once-departed soul, returned to life in Hisui. Derives power from resentment, which rises as energy atop its head and takes on the forms of foes. In this way, Zorua vents lingering malice.

products.name: 0571 - Zoroark
products.pokemon_description: With its disheveled white fur, it looks like an embodiment of death. Heedless of its own safety, Zoroark attacks its nemeses with a bitter energy so intense, it lacerates Zoroark's own body.

products.name: 0644 - Zekrom
products.pokemon_description: When the interior part of its tail spins like a motor, Zekrom can generate many bolts of lightning to blast its surroundings.

products.name: 0658 - Ash-Greninja
products.pokemon_description: It appears and vanishes with a ninja’s grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, while slicing them with throwing stars of sharpest water.

products.name: 0658 - Greninja
products.pokemon_description: It appears and vanishes with a ninja’s grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, while slicing them with throwing stars of sharpest water.

products.name: 0700 - Sylveon
products.pokemon_description: It emits a soothing aura from its ribbon-shaped organs. It wraps these appendages around quarrelers to instantly restore calm to the situation.

products.name: 0778 - Mimikyu
products.pokemon_description: A gust of wind revealed what hides under this character’s rag to a passing Trainer, who went home and died painfully that very night.

products.name: 0887 - Dragapult
products.pokemon_description: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.

products.name: 0937 - Ceruledge
products.pokemon_description: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

products.name: 0959 - Tinkaton
products.pokemon_description: The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.
